title: Causal Relationship Identification
scenario: Identify the causal relationship between the following variables: 'temperature', 'humidity', and 'plant growth'. Use a Bayesian network to model the relationships between these variables and explain the direction of the relationships. The output should be a markdown document with a Bayes net diagram and a detailed description of the causal relationships.
constraints: The Bayes net diagram should use a standard notation (e.g. oval for random variables, arrows for edges).
The markdown document should contain at least 3 equations.

evaluationCriteria.description: The output meets all constraints specified in the prompt.
The causal relationships identified are accurate and consistent with the given variables.
The Bayes net diagram is valid and accurately represents the causal relationships.
